title: Ethereal+
description: A Vanilla+ experience — ultra-optimized, immersive, and breathtaking.
body:
# 🌌 ETHEREAL+ **The ultimate Vanilla+ experience.** Breathtaking visuals + **300+ FPS** + zero compromises ✨ [![Minecraft](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.21.10-green?style=for-the-badge&logo=minecraft)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/ethereal-plus) [![Fabric](https://img.shields.io/badge/Loader-Fabric-orange?style=for-the-badge)](https://fabricmc.net/) [![Vanilla+](https://img.shields.io/badge/Type-Vanilla+-blue?style=for-the-badge)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/ethereal-plus) ---
## What is Ethereal+? A **revolutionary Vanilla+ modpack** that proves you don't have to choose between beauty and performance: | Feature | What You Get | |---------|-------------| | 🎨 **Cinematic Visuals** | Shaders, realistic lighting, dynamic animations | | ⚡ **Ultra Performance** | Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore (+300% FPS) | | 🎮 **Enhanced Controls** | Full controller support built-in | | 🛠️ **Smart QoL** | Elegant utilities without clutter | | ❌ **Pure Vanilla** | Zero gameplay changes, 100% server compatible | --- ## Features
⚡ Performance **Graphics Optimization:** - 🚀 **Sodium** - Revolutionary rendering (+250% FPS) - 👁️ **Entity Culling** - Smart visibility optimization - 🎯 **More Culling** - Extended culling system - ⚡ **ImmediatelyFast** - Instant improvements - 💾 **FerriteCore** - 50% less RAM usage - ⚙️ **Lithium** - Complete game optimization - 🎮 **Dynamic FPS** - Resource saving when idle **Result: 300+ FPS on mid-range hardware.**
🎨 Visuals **Lighting & Shaders:** - 💡 **LambDynamicLights** - Dynamic lighting (torches, lava) - 🌈 **Iris Shaders** - Full shader support - ✨ **Complementary Reimagined r5.6.1** (included) - 🌤️ **Bliss Shaders v2.1.1** (included) **Entity & Textures:** - 🎭 **[ETF] Entity Texture Features** - Enhanced mob textures - 🧵 **[EMF] Entity Model Features** - Custom entity models - 🎬 **Animatica** - Animated textures (OptiFine format) - 🧥 **Capes** - Custom cape support - 🦄 **Better Mount HUD** - Enhanced riding interface **Visual Polish:** - 🌿 **BetterGrassify** - Enhanced grass rendering - 🖼️ **Cubes Without Borders** - Seamless borderless glass - 📦 **Optiboxes** - Optimized shulker boxes - 🔧 **Model Gap Fix** - Visual consistency
💎 Quality of Life - 🔍 **Zoomify** - OptiFine-style zoom - 📸 **Fabrishot** - High-res screenshots (4K/8K) - 🎖️ **Paginated Advancements** - Better advancement UI - 🎨 **Reese's Sodium Options** - Beautiful settings menu - 💬 **More Chat History** - Extended chat scrollback - 🚫 **No Chat Reports** - Privacy protection - 🎮 **Controlify** - Full controller support - 🔧 **Mod Menu** - Elegant mod management
--- ## Performance Benchmarks
| Scenario | Vanilla | Ethereal+ | Gain | |:--------:|:-------:|:---------:|:----:| | **🏞️ Exploration** | 70-90 | 250-300+ | **+280%** | | **🌈 With Shaders** | 40-60 | 120-180 | **+200%** | | **💾 RAM Usage** | 4-5 GB | 2.5-3 GB | **-45%** | *Tested on: RTX 3060 / Ryzen 5 5600X*
--- ## Installation
**Modrinth App (Recommended):** ``` 1️⃣ Download Modrinth App 2️⃣ Search "Ethereal+" 3️⃣ Click Install 4️⃣ Allocate 4-6GB RAM 5️⃣ Launch & Enjoy! ``` **Prism Launcher:** ``` 1️⃣ Install Prism Launcher 2️⃣ Add Instance → From Modrinth 3️⃣ Search "Ethereal+" 4️⃣ Set 4-6GB RAM 5️⃣ Play! ```
--- ## Technical Specifications
| Component | Details | |:---------:|:-------:| | 🎮 **Minecraft** | 1.21.10 | | 🧵 **Loader** | Fabric | | 💾 **RAM** | 4-6GB recommended | | 📦 **Mods** | 45 optimized mods | | 🌈 **Shaders** | 2 included | | 🎨 **Resource Packs** | 4 pre-configured | | ☕ **Java** | 17+ required |
--- ## Recommended Settings ```yaml Render Distance: 12-16 chunks VSync: OFF Max FPS: Unlimited Shader: Complementary Reimagined Graphics: Fancy ``` **Expected performance:** 120-180 FPS with shaders on mid-range GPU **Keybinds:** - **C** - Zoom - **O** - Shader Settings - **Shift + F2** - High-res Screenshot - **M** - Mod Menu --- ## FAQ
Does this work on servers? ✅ Yes! 100% client-side. Works on vanilla servers, Realms, and any network.
Can I use a controller? ✅ Full support via Controlify for Xbox, PlayStation, Nintendo Switch controllers with button remapping and vibration.
What are the PC requirements? **Minimum:** i5/Ryzen 3, 8GB RAM, integrated graphics → 80-120 FPS **Recommended:** i5/Ryzen 5, GTX 1060, 16GB RAM → 200-300 FPS **With shaders:** 120+ FPS on mid-range GPU
Can I use other shaders? ✅ Iris supports hundreds of shaders. Try BSL, Sildur's Vibrant, Complementary Unbound, and more from Modrinth.
--- ## Complete Mod List **⚡ Performance:** Sodium • Lithium • FerriteCore • ImmediatelyFast • Entity Culling • More Culling • Dynamic FPS **🎨 Visual:** Iris • ETF • EMF • Animatica • LambDynamicLights • BetterGrassify • Capes • Better Mount HUD • Cubes Without Borders • Model Gap Fix • Optiboxes **🛠️ Quality of Life:** Zoomify • Fabrishot • Mod Menu • Paginated Advancements • Reese's Sodium Options • More Chat History • No Chat Reports • Controlify **🔧 Technical:** Fabric API • Cloth Config • YACL • Forge Config API Port • Fabric Language Kotlin • Crash Assistant • MixinTrace • YOSBR • Remove Reloading Screen • Puzzle • OptiGUI • Main Menu Credits **🌈 Included Content:** Complementary Reimagined r5.6.1 • Bliss v2.1.1 • Chat Reporting Helper • Mod Menu Helper • Redstone Tweaks • Sodium Translations --- ## Credits **Performance:** CaffeineMC (Sodium/Lithium) • malte0811 (FerriteCore) • tr7zw (Entity Culling) • RaphiMC (ImmediatelyFast) **Visuals:** coderbot/IMS (Iris) • Traben (ETF/EMF) • FoundationGames (Animatica) • LambdAurora (LambDynamicLights) • UltimatChamp (BetterGrassify) **Shaders:** EminGT (Complementary) • X0nk (Bliss) **Quality of Life:** isxander (Controlify/Zoomify/YACL) • ramidzkh (Fabrishot) • Terraformers (Mod Menu) • FlashyReese (Reese's Sodium Options) • Aizistral (No Chat Reports) **Foundation:** modmuss50 (Fabric API) • shedaniel (Cloth Config/YOSBR) • Fuzs (Forge Config Port) • KostromDan (Crash Assistant) **Special thanks** to the Fabric team and every mod developer who makes this possible. ---
**⭐ Support the project:** Star on Modrinth • Leave a Review • Share Screenshots (#EtherealPlus) • Report Bugs • Suggest Features --- *"Minecraft — more beautiful, more alive, smoother than ever."* **v1.0.0** | **MC 1.21.10** | **Fabric** | **45 Mods + 2 Shaders** [📥 Download](https://modrinth.com/modpack/ethereal-plus) • [🐛 Issues](https://modrinth.com/modpack/ethereal-plus/issues) --- **License:** Curated collection of open-source mods. All rights belong to respective authors. **Ethereal+** enhances everything about vanilla Minecraft while maintaining 100% compatibility and zero gameplay changes.
